title: Vertical or slanted column titles
excerpt: It would be great if it was possible to set the column titles so that they were at 45 degrees sloping up so that a long column title could be read even if the column’s width is resized to a smaller width because say it’s…

posts.author: rich-ecologic-sips (Rich Amos)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if it was possible to set the column titles so that they were at 45 degrees sloping up so that a long column title could be read even if the column’s width is resized to a smaller width because say it’s just a checkbox column - something like this:

posts.author: rich-ecologic-sips (Rich Amos)
posts.cookedHtml: Bumping this to see if we can get some more votes! I’m sure it would be really useful to most users
